hero.title: Cakes That Tell
hero.subtitle: Every cake is a work of art crafted with passion and precision. Based in Sidi Bel Abbès, Gateaux Patience makes your most precious moments unforgettable.

featured.title: Sweet Masterpieces
featured.subtitle: Discover a selection of our finest creations, each designed to make your event unforgettable.

categories.title: For Every Occasion
categories.subtitle: Custom creations for all your celebration moments

about.title: The Art of Baking
about.paragraph1: Since 2018, Gateaux Patience has been creating exceptional pastries in Sidi Bel Abbès. Every creation is the fruit of a deep passion for culinary art and artisanal know-how passed on with love.
about.paragraph2: Our philosophy: every cake should be as beautiful as it is delicious. We use only premium quality ingredients to guarantee an unforgettable taste experience.
about.quality_desc: Rigorous selection of the finest products
about.custom_desc: Every creation tailored to your wishes

how_to_order.title: Simple & Easy
how_to_order.subtitle: Order your dream cake in 4 simple steps
how_to_order.step1_desc: Browse our gallery and find inspiration for your event
how_to_order.step2_desc: Call us or send a WhatsApp message with your wishes
how_to_order.step3_desc: We discuss the details: size, flavor, decoration and design
how_to_order.step4_desc: Receive your sweet masterpiece and savor the moment

meta.home_title: Gateaux Patience | Artisan Bakery in Sidi Bel Abbès
meta.home_desc: Custom cakes and artisan pastries in Sidi Bel Abbès, Algeria. Birthdays, weddings, graduations. Order your custom cake since 2018.
meta.gallery_desc: Discover our gallery of custom handcrafted cakes: birthdays, weddings, kids, graduations and more.
